title: stelis viamontis
intro: Stelis viamontis is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, native to Central America. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Stelis viamontis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Stelis viamontis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and roots, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to apply its medicinal properties.
